name: Verlin Labs
tagline: Clarity-first learning for the AI age
description: Understand complex AI concepts through clear mental models. Free 2-hour session, hands-on programs for students, engineers, and product managers.

footer.tagline: I am Aman, a PM who has spent years building AI systems that move the needle. Verlin Labs is my attempt to make that kind of clear thinking available to students, engineers, and fellow PMs.

newsletter.title: Stay sharp on AI and technology
newsletter.description: Weekly mental models, frameworks, and clarity-first insights - no noise.
